objectives: Security audit of mx20022 Rust ISO 20022 financial message library
important_facts: quick-xml 0.37.5 used for XML parsing (no DTD/entity expansion by default)
Financial amounts use integer-cent arithmetic in scheme validators
f64 used in FedNow max_amount threshold conversion
risks_issues: SEC-01: f64 to u64 cast in FedNow max_amount conversion
SEC-02: No file size limit on CLI file reads
SEC-03: User-controlled XML reflected in error messages
SEC-04: parse_amount_cents integer overflow on extreme values
SEC-05: xml_scan string scanning bypasses XML semantics

iteration.summary: Completed full security audit of mx20022 codebase covering XML parsing, pattern codegen, scheme validators, CLI, and translation. Found several medium/low severity issues. No critical vulnerabilities. The codebase has strong foundations: unsafe forbidden, cargo-deny, integer arithmetic for amounts.
